meta.title: For the Promise
meta._provenance: Built from the Book 2 manuscript (draft/chapters/, ~16,600 words), the author's character sheets, worldbuilding compendium, Book 1 sample, and roadmap. Prose is the highest authority. See planning/constellation-bible.md 'Continuity Flags' for known contradictions.
meta._date_flag: Manuscript datelines say 982 A.M.; compendium places Book 2 in 983-985 A.M. (Flag #13)

progress.current_scene: Chapter 5 second half DRAFTED (pending author review — see draft/chapter-05-draft-notes.md); Chapter 6 next

1.title: The Arrival
1.summary: Campfire in the Blackwood clearing north of Vespine's Cradle: Munch, the rabbits, the two moons. Brunor's memory-spiral of Uthred's harshness and Johanna at the Hudria watchtower; the headache that follows. The monsters argument (Stonefield, Erasmus); Elaine reveals Johanna's bundle — the silver-blue river stone and the unfinished stallion carving — and her vow. Next morning: the Silver Road, Glintgate, Mikah Cullard at the Silver Gate (letter inspection; asks where Phoebe is), the stables, Frederick waiting. Council 'tomorrow'.

brunor.emotional_state: Closed after shutting down the Johanna conversation

elaine.emotional_state: Rebuffed; carrying the bundle and the silence

2.title: The Square
2.summary: Merchant quarter/Goldroad: amenicite daggers, the mark reading war-dread under the hawkers' cheer, alms to beggars, the amethyst necklace — then the hooded man wearing it: followed since the gate, meant to be seen. Bordou Square ('the Crimson Cage'): Hans delivers Damien's summons naming 'Elaine Morrandis the Bastard'; Brunor's dagger draws blood; Lord Chancellor Damien Beauforth arrives — Gungnir, the golden runed blade. Accusations traded: Alessa's ambush vs a Naaren-spy story. Qunthren bay taunts. 'To lose the rift and your dignity in the same night.' Contest of arms accepted: to whoever yields.

3.title: The Keep
3.dates: 8th of Ashenfall, afternoon (Caer Seryth, Vespur Plains, Halreth)
3.summary: Phoebe fails her sequence all morning; the mismatched boot; the blister. Tella (half a spiked flail, limp) corrects her grip and her fear: who trained Elaine, words as daggers, swords as bargaining chips; the riftmark's weight; 'a political disaster for the Vel'Eran queen should she choose to be one'; Damien fears her. Ryn's acting command needled: 'ego. Or the thing that comes after and is worse. Disloyalty.' Phoebe leaves whispering the truth Tella didn't say.

4.title: The Duel
4.summary: The contest: Caltherian court fencing over spear instincts; first blood to Damien, displayed. Psychological warfare — Uthred, Elaine, then Alessa — and Brunor charges; brawl; Nullbrand hums off Damien's enchanted gambeson. Killing blows declared; Elaine steps between them — her blade on Nullbrand, her dagger catching the golden plunge — and turns both men out of the bind. The grey-hooded woman at the gates, unmoved by blood. Damien says something only Elaine hears; her color goes. 'Golden Scales guildhall. By week's end.' Then the alley argument: the suppressed Alessa reports (Brunor silenced her scouts and can't say it), the Vigil context, Merea and 'congratulations', 'You are suffocating me, Brunor.' Frederick arrives out of the rain.

5.title: The Tavern / The Council
5.summary: AUTHOR'S HALF: The tavern — Beatrice, Vel'Eran spirits; the mark grinding against forty strangers; Frederick's 'Before.' and 'Two ropes... I count what's there.'; the charcoal word: Scaleblade; Celisia named; the void compared to Mark; why she really stopped the duel; Damien's rain-words withheld. The College of Cvostral: Darrian vs Osfeld, Unara Lackmin, Damien's smooth walls, the no-record chamber, Tauvor's opening. DRAFTED (pending review): the confession — Wyrshade vivisection, fifteen dead, Elaine recognizes inverted Detect Memory and withholds it; the butchery (she names the hive only inwardly); the untranslated voice on the one paper in the room ('Something answered.'); the pivot to First Era records and Vel'Era's deep forests; the escort contract (nine researchers, name-your-rate, truth withheld). Trio neither accepts nor refuses. 'Well. It pays.' / 'It's wrong.'
5._draft_note: Second half drafted by assistant 2026-07-12; inventions listed in draft/chapter-05-draft-notes.md

6.title: The Golden Scale and the Hunt
6.summary: TO DRAFT (roadmap): Frederick and Elaine at the guildhall face Damien's wife; Brunor hunts the Order through the city; convergence — the Order is infrastructure, and aware. Three problems at once.

brunor_halvyr.emotional_state: Silent, ashamed after the duel and the alley argument; forearm cut bandaged; split lip, bruised nose

knows.fact: He suppressed the Alessa ambush reports and silenced Elaine's scouts — she doesn't know the second part
Celisia is a Scaleblade; the Order is in Glintgate

relationships.merea: Secret relationship; announced to Elaine and Frederick before Book 2

elaine_morrandis.emotional_state: Fury banked into control; carrying three withheld things: Damien's rain-words, the Throng knowledge, her feelings

knows.fact: Celisia (Scaleblade) revealed herself deliberately at the gate; same void as Mark before he was known
Kymancy/Detect Memory explains the Wyrshade assault (recognition pending the confession beats)
The Throng hive mind — Melody's Book 1 intelligence
Whatever Damien said in the rain (withheld from reader and companions)

Johanna's bundle: river stone + unfinished stallion carving

relationships.tella: Mentor; taught her the political forms

frederick_rowain.emotional_state: Holding the middle; refused to let Brunor hang alone

knows.fact: Knew about Alessa 'before' — read the report the same morning as Brunor

inventory.item: Claymore; bull-shaped helmet; red leather ledger; silver Promise ring from Brunor

relationships.elaine: 'Two ropes' honesty; she leans on him
relationships.west: Cleared him for duty weeks ago (siege injury implied; Cain gave him the head scar)

phoebe_morrandis.emotional_state: Frustrated, worried, rehearsing worst cases about Glintgate

knows.fact: Brunor and Merea's relationship (sheets: discovered it; resents the secrecy culture)

relationships.ryn: Acting commander she reports to; respects his precision

relationships.elaine: Student-daughter; the truth she didn't say aloud

damien_beauforth.emotional_state: Satisfied; bruise worn like an award

knows.fact: Whatever he said to Elaine in the rain

relationships.elaine: Cousin he brands bastard and fears
relationships.wife: Delegates precision diplomacy to her (ch6 planned)

established_facts.fact: Book 2 opens 7th-9th of Ashenfall, 982 A.M. — campfire (7th), arrival/duel/tavern (8th), College/council (9th)
Archwarden Rhen Tauvor leads the Caltheran Council of Twelve (eleven Wardens + Archwarden); Ch 1's 'Telvor' is a typo (Flag #1)
Nullbrand is Brunor's black blade: pre-Chroma metal, passive null field, mutes Elaine's mark nearby
Elaine: House Morrandis of Vel'Era (cadet of House Arsenia); niece of Queen Lysandria Arsenia; Damien Beauforth's cousin; branded 'the Bastard'; missing left pinky; riftmarked of Kymancy
The Promise 'lost the rift' in the Order's siege of the keep (Damien's taunt) — exact loss to confirm

Alessa (Quartermaster Captain Alessa Dornal) was ambushed on the Glintgate road two months ago; route leaked; escort slaughtered; she was made to watch; recovering. Brunor suppressed the reports and silenced Elaine's scouts.
The Wyrshade vivisection (981 A.M.) started a five-year countdown to the awakening of Elyrieth, the Kymancy Drake; the Kymancy Rift is at the Shadowfen (Naaren); nobody in-world knows the clock runs
Celisia Ylmindian ('The Witch', Scaleblade, Master Conjurer) revealed herself deliberately to Elaine at the Silver Gate; reads as a void, like the person Mark before he was known

The Order of the Wyrm: anonymous true leader; Judas Wynvale second; ten Scaleblades in Voidsteel with drake-engraved helms; three helms missing; canon foils — Judas:Brunor, Caelus:Elaine, Kennway:Frederick, Celisia:Lune, Brycen:Hollow, Quinn:Merea
Damien Beauforth is Lord Chancellor of Glintgate; golden runed blade + Gungnir; enchanted gambeson; never lost a duel; unreadable to the mark ('smooth walls')
Unara Lackmin, Queen of Morninghall, sister of Warden Narana Lackmin, watched the trio at the College; five thousand garrison in forced-march reach
The northern rift crisis is public: settlements emptying, wardstones tested, Darrian's eleven holders' seals seeking hired steel
Two moons, Luuna and Sol; one visibly shattered and brighter (standing rule for night scenes; ch1 predates this rule — Flag)
Caer Seryth stands in Halreth's Vespur Plains at the base of Vespine's Cradle; Glintgate is southern Caltheran through the passes; the Aldren rises near the Cradle
Johanna Halvyr was found floating dead in a lake, cause unknown; her final words are carved into the war table
Stonefield (~2 years ago): rogue Promise detachment under Esmarus IV executed a civilian family; Brunor and Elaine killed the same men; Ephram, a teenage deserter, was hanged under Brunor's command
Currency: silver seals, copper carp. Amenicite: dark-red metal from the Sol'telarī (Varkaan).
War brewing since last winter: Naaren vs the four kingdoms; Glintgate's fighting men conscripted; Damien denies the war

foreshadowing._note: Full tracker with 16 major threads: outline/foreshadowing-tracker.md

planted.thread: The Archwarden's Silence — why the Twelve travel and leave no record
Damien's unheard words to Elaine in the rain
Celisia's deliberate reveal; Caelus possibly behind the void
The poisoned contract — used twice for the same catastrophe
Brunor's unsaid thing; Frederick's two-ropes debt
Mark — the void 'before any of us knew what he was'; the chroma storm
Mikah asking where Phoebe is, twice
Johanna's bundle — the monster-line talisman; the future child
Ryn Halden: acting command + confessed love + Tella's 'disloyalty' warning

timeline.ch1_scene1: 7th of Ashenfall, 982 A.M. — Day of Hollow — Blackwood clearing
timeline.ch1_scene2: 8th — Day of Flame — Silver Road into Glintgate, dawn to midday
timeline.ch5_college: 9th — the College of Cvostral ('the evening before' = the duel)
timeline._flag: Roadmap's 'one week after the tavern' is superseded by prose; compendium's 983-985 window vs 982 datelines unresolved (Flag #13)

caer_seryth.description: The Promise's keep, six hundred souls; eastern Vespur Plains (Halreth), base of Vespine's Cradle; war chamber with Johanna's carved words

glintgate.description: Southern Caltheran commercial engine on the Aldren estuary: Bridge of Kings, Adian's Mount, Silver Gate, Goldroad, skybridges, Bordou Square ('the Crimson Cage'), Candler's Row, College of Cvostral, Golden Scale guildhall, western entertainment ward

blackwood_forest.description: Silent pines north of Vespine's Cradle (Caltheran); House Blackwood's ancient no-battle law

hudria.description: Caltheran/Varkaan border city; Halvyrs' original keep town; the watchtower; now governed by House Farryn

the_vigil.description: Promise rift outpost; Elaine's three-week mission surrounded by the Order; Reyka commands there (Book 1 state)

shadowfen.description: Naaren marshland southwest near the Caltheran border; the Kymancy Rift corridor; the pulse that sees Elaine

vel_era.description: Arsenia queendom; primordial silver forest; secret Druids; the Hollow Crown in forbidden zones; expedition target

college_of_cvostral.description: Slivermen's guild school at the Goldroad's end; rune-cut granite; the Twelve held court there

brunor:elaine.status: Lowest point of trust: suppressed reports exposed, 'suffocating', the unsaid thing on both sides

elaine:frederick.status: Hard honesty accepted; he sided with the decision, not against her

brunor:merea.status: Secret relationship, announced to the inner circle; Phoebe knows and resents

elaine:damien.status: Cousin-enemies; his fear vs her restraint; his rain-words unrevealed

trio:order.status: Watched, announced to (Celisia), and about to be studied back (ch6)

mercy_acts.description: Copper carp to six beggars until Brunor stops her
Dagger drawn blood but withheld the kill in the open square
